Premium Exporter of
Basmati Rice

Basmati is a premium long-grain rice variety traditionally grown in the Himalayan foothills of India. The word "Basmati" means "fragrant", which reflects its naturally rich aroma and delicate flavor.

Indian Basmati is globally recognized for

Extra-long slender grains

Distinct natural aroma

Non-sticky, separate grains

Soft, fluffy texture after cooking

India is the largest producer and exporter of Basmati rice in the world.

What We Offer

Our Products

1121 Basmati

  • Extra-long grain (most popular export variety)
  • High elongation
  • Strong aroma
  • Premium segment (Europe & Gulf)

Sella (Parboiled) Basmati

  • Light golden colour
  • Firm texture
  • Ideal for biryani & bulk catering

Steam Basmati

  • Softer than sella
  • Bright white appearance
  • Premium retail segment

1121 Basmati

  • Extra-long grain (most popular export variety)
  • High elongation
  • Strong aroma
  • Premium segment (Europe & Gulf)

Sella (Parboiled) Basmati

  • Light golden colour
  • Firm texture
  • Ideal for biryani & bulk catering

Steam Basmati

  • Softer than sella
  • Bright white appearance
  • Premium retail segment

WHO WE ARE

About Us

At Diyan Rice Mill Industry, we are committed to delivering premium-quality rice with purity, consistency, and excellence. With deep roots in the Indian rice industry, we specialize in sourcing, milling, processing, and supplying high-grade Basmati and Non-Basmati rice to domestic and international markets.

Our mill combines traditional expertise with modern processing technology to ensure every grain meets the highest standards of quality. From paddy selection to final packaging, we maintain strict quality control at every stage.

Our advanced milling infrastructure enables us to deliver rice that is rich in aroma, perfect in length, and superior in taste. We proudly serve wholesalers, distributors, retailers, and exporters with customized packaging solutions and bulk supply options.

WHY US

Our
Commitment

  • Premium quality rice with consistent grading
  • Hygienic processing and modern milling technology
  • Customized packaging solutions
  • Competitive pricing with reliable supply
  • Strong focus on export standard

At Diyan Rice Mill Industry, we believe that quality is not just a product — it is our promise.

Our Mission

At Diyan Rice Mill Industry, our mission is to:

  • Deliver superior-quality Basmati and Non-Basmati rice through advanced milling and strict quality control
  • Build strong and transparent relationships with farmers, suppliers, and global buyers
  • Ensure timely delivery and customized packaging solutions to meet diverse market demands
  • Continuously improve our processes through technology, innovation, and sustainable practices
  • Maintain ethical business values and customer satisfaction as our top priority

At Diyan Rice Mill Industry, our mission is to:

  • Deliver superior-quality Basmati and Non-Basmati rice through advanced milling and strict quality control
  • Build strong and transparent relationships with farmers, suppliers, and global buyers
  • Ensure timely delivery and customized packaging solutions to meet diverse market demands
  • Continuously improve our processes through technology, innovation, and sustainable practices
  • Maintain ethical business values and customer satisfaction as our top priority

Our Vision

To become a trusted global leader in premium rice processing and exports, recognized for quality, consistency, and long-term partnerships. We aim to bring the authentic taste and richness of Indian rice to households across the world while maintaining the highest standards of integrity, sustainability, and excellence.

To become a trusted global leader in premium rice processing and exports, recognized for quality, consistency, and long-term partnerships. We aim to bring the authentic taste and richness of Indian rice to households across the world while maintaining the highest standards of integrity, sustainability, and excellence.
